data.title: Polar vortex could lead to pests invading homes, says National Pest Management Association.
data.description: Fairfax, VA - The National Pest Management Association has issued a warning that the polar vortex is driving pests into households. The organization's experts advise on effective strategies to ready homes and shield against this invasion.

data.title: VINITALY.USA 2026 festival in NYC on Oct 26-27 at Pier 36; NY represents 6.5% of US wine consumption.
data.description: Verona, Italy - On January 22, 2026, it was reported that the State of New York accounts for 6.5% of total wine consumption in the United States, making it the third-largest market nationally after California and Texas. Additionally, New York holds the top spot in the Northeast region with 34% of wine consumption.

data.title: Mark Farrah Associates presents 5500 Employer Health Plus tool, simplifying analysis of 5500 private-sector health insurance benefits.
data.description: A new product called 5500 Employer Health Plus is being introduced by Mark Farrah Associates (MFA) in Canonsburg, Pennsylvania. The tool, available on www.markfarrah.com, aims to streamline the assessment of employer health and welfare benefits. It covers various aspects such as health, drug, dental, vision, disability, and more.

data.title: Fidelity leads in retirement plan digital experience for the third year, TIAA also rising in industry focus.
data.description: The latest Corporate Insight Mobile Experience Retirement Plan Benchmark has recently been released, highlighting TIAA's ongoing success and the growing industry emphasis on data and user-friendliness. The report, unveiled on January 22, 2026, in New York, indicates significant progress by retirement plan providers in enhancing their mobile applications. In particular, TIAA is shown to be excelling in this area, with a noticeable increase in market presence. The benchmark also underscores the broader industry trend towards prioritizing data quality and ease of use in mobile interfaces.

data.title: WLD price could reach $0.62-$0.73 in 3-4 weeks, showing potential gains of 30-54% from current $0.47. Entry near Bollinger Band support suggested.
data.description: Analysts are optimistic about the potential gains of Worldcoin (WLD), forecasting an increase of 30-54% within the next 3-4 weeks. The target price range is set between $0.62 and $0.73. With the current price at $0.47, there is an opportunity for entry near the Bollinger Band support level.

data.title: Tulsa company advises homeowners on winter emergencies: Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric shares tips.
data.description: Experts in home services based in Tulsa are highlighting typical winter emergencies and providing guidance on swift responses. The company, Quality Heating, Cooling, Plumbing & Electric, situated in Glenpool, Oklahoma, emphasizes the importance of being prepared for unexpected situations. They underscore the significance of immediate action in addressing issues such as heating system failures or plumbing emergencies. By offering tips and recommendations, they aim to assist homeowners in effectively dealing with these challenges during the colder months.

data.title: SPIE honors best new products in photonics industry at 18th annual Prism Awards during SPIE Photonics West, celebrating transformative advancements.
data.description: In Bellingham, Washington, on January 21st, SPIE, a global organization for optics and photonics, acknowledged outstanding new products in the industry through the Prism Awards. The event, part of SPIE Photonics West, celebrated its 18th year of recognizing companies introducing groundbreaking products. The Prism Awards showcase the industry's rapid growth, latest advancements, and technical innovations. This year's ceremony highlighted the top-rated optics and photonics products making a significant impact.

data.title: New GPU tactics reduce AI inference costs by 40% - latency cut by 50-100ms, per-token costs down up to 5x through quantization and decoding strategies.
data.description: AI company Together has recently disclosed that they have successfully implemented techniques to reduce inference latency by 50-100 milliseconds in their production environment. This was achieved by utilizing quantization and smart decoding methods, resulting in a significant decrease in per-token costs by up to five times. These improvements are crucial in optimizing the performance and cost-effectiveness of AI solutions.

data.title: SUI price is at $1.51, expected to reach $1.61-$2.20 by Feb. Technical signals mixed with caution needed.
data.description: The stock of SUI is currently trading at $1.51, with analysts predicting a target range of $2.00 to $2.42 by February. Technical analysis indicates a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 38.81, but the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum suggests a need for caution when considering investment in this stock.

data.title: Global High Precision Laser Rangefinder market valued at USD 52,100M in 2024, projected to reach USD 204,750M.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of January 22, 2026, the market size for High Precision Laser Rangefinders stands at a significant value. According to Valuates Reports, the global market was valued at USD 52,100 million in 2024. It is predicted to increase substantially, reaching a revised size of USD 204,750 million.
